topic: Meta-Laws of Reality Codex — Universal Laws, Principles, and Axioms Across 9 Domains
content_preview: Comprehensive codex of universal laws across 9 domains (physics, philosophy, computation, myth, social science, art, game design, legal, esoteric). 7 core meta-laws (Causality, Perception, Entropy, Recursion, Contrast, Connection, Conservation), 50+ domain-specific laws, 8 universal archetypes, and 6 cross-domain meta-patterns (Duality, Causality, Recursion, Entropy, Emergence, Governance). ChatGPT thread export from May 2025.
